resume_text:
ISHAN THETE  
Vadodara • +91 7620530233  • Ishanthete42@gmail.com  
 
 
SUMMARY  
Detail -oriented and analytical commerce graduate with hands -on experience in financial and 
data -driven operations. Currently working as a Financial Analyst, with strong exposure to 
financial data validation, analysis, and client deliverables. Known for high accuracy, attention to 
detail, and timely execution of tasks while adhering to operational SLAs. Proficient in Excel -
based reporting, process compliance, and cross -functional coor dination to support business 
objectives.  
 
 
WORK EXPERIENCE  
Archer Transnational Systems Pvt. Ltd., Vadodara  
Finance Trainee | Oct 2024 – Oct 2025.  
● Supported day -to-day financial transaction processing and documentation in line with 
operational SLAs.  
● As sisted in structured financial reporting using MS Excel and SQL for data tracking and 
analysis.  
● Coordinated with cross -functional teams to ensure accurate and timely finance operations.  
● Contributed to audit support activities and monthly reporting proc esses.  
● Worked effectively within defined scopes, timelines, and quality standards.  
 
AIS Info, Vadodara  
Financial Analyst | Nov 2025 – Present  
● Analyzing and validating financial data to support accurate client reporting and decision -
making.  
● Performing reconciliations, quality checks, and variance reviews to ensure data accuracy and 
consistency.  
● preparing, maintaining, and reviewing financial reports using MS Excel and spreadsheet tools.  
● Supporting periodic reporting cycles while meeting defined SLAs  and turnaround timelines.  
 
EDUCATION  
● B.Com (Hons.) – Delhi University  
  CGPA: 5.77 | Year: 2021 - 2024  
● HSC – Maharashtra State Board (Commerce)  
  Score: 72.00% | Year: 2020  
● SSC – Maharashtra State Board  
  Score: 77.40% | Year: 2018  
 
 
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION  
 Technical Skills – Data  validation and Processing, Analytical Thinking and Problem 
solving, Client Deliverables Management, Attention to Detail and Accuracy, Process 
Optimization, Time and Workload Management, Cross functional team collaboration,  
Microsoft excel and spreadsheet tools, Effective Communication.  
 
 Core Competencies  – Microsoft Excel (Pivot tables, Vlookup, Data Cleaning), Google 
sheets, Familiar with Quality Checks and Data Consistency, Documentation and Data 
Entry .
jd_text:
Job Title: Trainee Accountant (US Accounting and Taxation). Location: Vadodara. Job Type: Full Time / Onsite. Department: CPA. Shifts: Late Afternoon Shift.

Job Summary: We are seeking a highly skilled Trainee Accountant (US Accounting and Taxation) to join our dynamic CPA team. This role focuses on Document Management, Payroll Processing, Tax Return Preparation, Accounting Assistance, ensuring high availability and reliability. The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise, problem solving skills, and a proactive approach to accounting.

Key Responsibilities: Document Management : Organize and maintain accounting records and related documentation, Accounting Assistance : Support with general accounting tasks such as journal entries, reconciliations, and financial statement preparation, Payroll Processing : Assist with payroll processing for clients, ensuring compliance and accuracy, Tax Return Preparation : Assist in preparing US tax returns (individuals, corporations, partnerships, etc.), and On-the-job training will be provided to ensure proficiency in US accounting and taxation practices.

Required Qualifications: B.Com or M.Com (Freshers or 1-2 years of experience in accounting and taxation), Basic understanding of accounting principles and a strong willingness to learn US tax regulations, and Proficiency in MS Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks).
